messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Pipeline board: post the new message BEFORE deleting the old one, so there is always at least one board to look at
How it works: On a content change the new message is posted before the old one is deleted

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-468 - Pipeline board: post the new message BEFORE deleting the old one, so there is always at least one board to look at is complete.
